<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en"><head>

    <meta http-equiv="Cache-Control" content="no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate">

    <script src="https://unpkg.com/lightweight-charts@4.1.0/dist/lightweight-charts.standalone.production.js"></script>
    <!-- Control Slider Component -->

    <!-- Help System -->
    <script src="../help-system.js"></script>
    <script src="../ws-client.js" defer=""></script>
    
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        
        body {
            font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', 'Roboto', 'Monaco', monospace;
            background: #000;
            color: #fff;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        
        #app {
            width: 100vw;
            height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }
        
        /* Top Toolbar */
        #toolbar {
            background: rgba(20, 20, 30, 0.95);
            border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(74, 222, 128, 0.2);
            padding: 12px 20px;

    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <meta http-equiv="Cache-Control" content="no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate">
    <title>Trade Opportunities - Port 1427</title>
    
    <script src="../help-system.js" defer=""></script>
    <script src="../ws-client.js" defer=""></script>
    
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        
        body {
            font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', 'Roboto', 'Monaco', monospace;
            background: #000;
            color: #fff;
            padding: 20px;
            overflow-x: hidden;
        }
        
        .container {
            max-width: 1800px;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }
        
        .header {
            margin-bottom: 30px;
            padding-bottom: 20px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(74, 222, 128, 0.3);
        }
        
        .header h1 {
            font-size: 28px;
            color: #4ade80;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
